title: rotang ornatus
intro: Rotang ornatus, also known as the "staff tree," is a type of plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It is a deciduous tree with a straight trunk and branches, traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing, fever reduction, and digestive relief. In Ayurvedic herbal preparations, Rotang ornatus is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
